name: components/checkbox
description: A form control that allows users to select one or more items from a set. Provides a complete composition system with Checkbox, CheckboxLabel, CheckboxDescription, CheckboxInput, and CheckboxControl (including a built-in checkmark indicator). Supports invalid states, disabled states, and full keyboard accessibility via Kobalte Checkbox primitives.
useCases: Multi-select filters in search panels and data-table toolbars
Consent and terms-of-service agreements in registration flows
Bulk action selection in list views and email inboxes
Feature toggles in settings forms where multiple options can be enabled simultaneously
usage: import { Checkbox, CheckboxLabel, CheckboxDescription, CheckboxInput, CheckboxControl } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/checkbox"
